title: Policy: Restore Defaults with Policy applied
scenario: Verify that policy-locked settings remain unchanged after a "Restore Defaults" action on a device.
steps: Apply a policy to a device
Open the mobile app and navigate to Settings > Reset Device > Restore Defaults
Check the settings affected by the policy
expected: The settings affected by the policy remain locked and their values are not changed by the restore action, staying in line with the policy.
